sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68578" key="mono/lwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-λωπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68578.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with but one garment</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
